title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: WeatherNext, Google DeepMind's global weather forecasting AI model, successfully predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track in October 2025, providing advance warning days before the Category 5 storm made landfall in Jamaica. The model enabled meteorologists and authorities to issue timely evacuation warnings and protect vulnerable communities.
